subtitle: Accra's busiest and most exuberant beach — a paid-entry pleasure beach of live reggae and hiplife, drumming, dancing, and horses on the sand, on a West African coast where the tide keeps returning the city's plastic.
spike_statement: Accra's busiest beach: a paid-entry pleasure beach of reggae nights, drumming, and horses on the sand, on a coast where the tide keeps bringing the city's plastic back ashore.

levers.photo_tone: warm West African light over a crowded golden-brown beach, horses on the wet sand, live-band stages and dancers, the Atlantic surf behind, plastic at the tide line in the honest frames
